title: BugHunter – Bug Bounty Toolkit Powered by Claude and Free AI Providers
description: A new open-source bug bounty hunting toolkit called BugHunter, built on top of Anthropic’s Claude Code and now extended to support free AI providers like Ollama and Groq, is gaining traction in the security research community for automating the full... title: Meta Moves to Control Rising AI Costs as Employee Usage Surges
